channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-24 01:28 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Congrats and a huge thank you to the SpaceX team that always delivers. This was an incredible first ...
item.description: Congrats and a huge thank you to the SpaceX team that always delivers. This was an incredible first flight of a brand new vehicle. Our collective future flying amongst the stars has become so much closer.

item.title: @elonmusk: It was a very good dayspacex.com/launches/starship…
item.description: It was a very good dayspacex.com/launches/starship…

item.title: @elonmusk: why else are we here if not to live with unreasonable passion for things
item.description: why else are we here if not to live with unreasonable passion for things

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX has just launched and deployed ~45 tons to space. This was one of the heaviest payloads since...
item.description: SpaceX has just launched and deployed ~45 tons to space. This was one of the heaviest payloads since Polyus launched by Energia in 1987 and Skylab launched by Saturn V in 1973!

item.title: @elonmusk: Today SpaceX launched ~45tons of Starlink mass simulators on Starship Flight 12, the highest payload...
item.description: Today SpaceX launched ~45tons of Starlink mass simulators on Starship Flight 12, the highest payload tonnage to space since Saturn V's Skylab (77t) in 1973. This is a huge milestone for spaceflight and cannot be ignored, the future of space and this program is so bright!!

item.title: @elonmusk: The Starship V3 heat shield held well
item.description: The Starship V3 heat shield held well

item.title: @elonmusk: Jason Calacanis on SpaceX's Unknown Origin Story: Elon Wanted to Back Up the Biosphere in Space!@Jas...
item.description: Jason Calacanis on SpaceX's Unknown Origin Story: Elon Wanted to Back Up the Biosphere in Space!@Jason: “Most people don't remember this, but when@elonmuskwas starting SpaceX, the original idea when he was running around with Adeo and they were looking at some rockets and getting carriage from Russian rockets was to back up the biosphere.” “And he came back from that trip and I remember talking to him about it and he said, ‘I think I just have to make my own rockets because that's actually where the problem is, and it would be easier just to make my own rocket to back up the biosphere.’ And he wanted to put geo-domes, like geodesic domes in space, with all the plants, wildlife, and creatures. What incredible vision. And then there was the necessity of actually getting that up into space, and that's the unknown origin story.”

item.title: @elonmusk: Photos of@elonmuskand@rookisaacmanat Starbase Mission Control during yesterday’s Starship flight 🔥
item.description: Photos of@elonmuskand@rookisaacmanat Starbase Mission Control during yesterday’s Starship flight 🔥

item.title: @elonmusk: Boring Company’s goal is to solve traffic in cities and one day build Hyperloop high-speed transit b...
item.description: Boring Company’s goal is to solve traffic in cities and one day build Hyperloop high-speed transit between city centers

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink, in collaboration with Brazilian non-profit Redes do Futuro, is connecting 140 schools acro...
item.description: Starlink, in collaboration with Brazilian non-profit Redes do Futuro, is connecting 140 schools across Brazil’s remote Amazon region to reliable high-speed internet. More than 14,000 students now have access to online learning tools, unlocking a world of possibility and potential 🛰️❤️

item.title: @elonmusk: Is there one photo that doesn't go hard? 🤯
item.description: Is there one photo that doesn't go hard? 🤯

item.title: @elonmusk: Real-time video of Starship from Starlink
item.description: Real-time video of Starship from Starlink

item.title: @elonmusk: My favorite photo from yesterday: A powerful sight as the latest iteration of Starship climbs throug...
item.description: My favorite photo from yesterday: A powerful sight as the latest iteration of Starship climbs through Texan skies. Captured via a sound-triggered camera, this camera captured the chaotic scene far better than I could from a safe distance. Prints available in the reply.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink enabled 4K live streaming from liftoff to splashdown during Starship’s 12th test flight 🛰️🚀
item.description: Starlink enabled 4K live streaming from liftoff to splashdown during Starship’s 12th test flight 🛰️🚀

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: Elon Musk hires Nicki Minaj as Chief Gyatt Officer at SpaceX
item.description: BREAKING: Elon Musk hires Nicki Minaj as Chief Gyatt Officer at SpaceX

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX is actively hiring world-class engineers/physicists for SpaceXAI, even if you have zero prior...
item.description: SpaceX is actively hiring world-class engineers/physicists for SpaceXAI, even if you have zero prior experience in AI. Smart humans figure it out fast. Please send an email with ~3 bullet points demonstrating evidence of exceptional ability to ai_eng@spacex.com.
